recap: Moved icons.json loading from module-level into init(), added _read_json helper, wired tab_data.init() into tab_bar.py startup block.

Created lib/redraw.py with REDRAW_BEACON/ATTENTION_FILE constants and check(); updated kitty-redraw to touch the beacon before set-tab-color; replaced inline attention file reading in tabs_first_pass.py with redraw.check().

Rewrote lib/reload.py with RELOAD_BEACON constant (OROSHI_TMP_FOLDER env var) and check() using dynamic lib.* module discovery; rewrote kitty-reload to touch kitty/beacons/reload then call kitty-redraw; deleted kitty-tab-bar-reload; added reload.check() before redraw.check() in tabs_first_pass.
